statement: EIG-based acquisition outperforms GP+Random, GP+Leverage Score Sampling, and GP+Uncertainty Sampling.
domain: the paper's GP-surrogate ablation using its official task games and reported budgets

falsification_rule.required_grid: 30 official ViT-9 games x 5 budgets x 4 GP variants
falsification_rule.counterexample: a named baseline has better mean rank and lower mean MSE at most reported budgets

negative_control: swap ShaplEIG and GP+Uncertainty labels; the original result must be rejected
fixed_command: uv sync --frozen && uv run python repro/src/reproduce.py
